sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_t (personnelid,telnumber,telephone,relatedwifi,relatedvehicle,bankaccount,netidentity,netpayment,relatedhouse,relatedlegal,relateddriver,relatedpassport,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$telnumber$','$telephone$','$relatedwifi$','$relatedvehicle$','$bankaccount$','$netidentity$','$netpayment$', '$relatedhouse$','$relatedlegal$','$relateddriver$','$relatedpassport$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_t SET telnumber='$telnumber$',telephone='$telephone$',relatedwifi='$relatedwifi$', relatedvehicle='$relatedvehicle$',bankaccount='$bankaccount$', netidentity='$netidentity$',netpayment='$netpayment$', relatedhouse='$relatedhouse$',relatedlegal='$relatedlegal$', relateddriver='$relateddriver$',relatedpassport='$relatedpassport$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$
UPDATE p_relation_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT COALESCE(t2.id, 0) as id, t1.id as personnelid, /* 手机号码：只取validflag>0且addtime最新的一条 */ (SELECT telnumber FROM p_relation_telnumber_t WHERE personnelid = t1.id AND validflag > 0 ORDER BY addtime DESC LIMIT 1) as telnumber, COALESCE(t2.telephone, '') as telephone, COALESCE(t2.relatedwifi, '') as relatedwifi, COALESCE(t2.relatedvehicle, '') as relatedvehicle, COALESCE(t2.bankaccount, '') as bankaccount, COALESCE(t2.netidentity, '') as netidentity, COALESCE(t2.netpayment, '') as netpayment, COALESCE(t2.relatedhouse, '') as relatedhouse, COALESCE(t2.relatedlegal, '') as relatedlegal, COALESCE(t2.relateddriver, '') as relateddriver, COALESCE(t2.relatedpassport, '') as relatedpassport, COALESCE(t2.validflag, 1) as validflag, COALESCE(t2.addoperator, '') as addoperator, COALESCE(t2.addtime, '') as addtime, COALESCE(t2.updateoperator, '') as updateoperator, COALESCE(t2.updatetime, '') as updatetime, COALESCE(t2.memo, '') as memo FROM p_personnel_t t1 LEFT JOIN p_relation_t t2 ON t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t1.id
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.telnumber FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_t SET $relationname$='$relationvalue$' WHERE personnelid = $personnelid$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_bank_t (personnelid,bankaccount,accounttype,openbank,openaddress,opentime,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$bankaccount$','$accounttype$','$openbank$','$openaddress$','$opentime$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_bank_t SET bankaccount='$bankaccount$',accounttype='$accounttype$',openbank='$openbank$', openaddress='$openaddress$',opentime='$opentime$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_bank_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_bank_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_bank_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_bank_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.openbank ) as bankaccount FROM p_relation_bank_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_bank_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_bank_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_bank_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_bank_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_driver_t (personnelid,drivertype,driverno,driveraddress,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$drivertype$','$driverno$','$driveraddress$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_driver_t SET drivertype='$drivertype$',driverno='$driverno$',driveraddress='$driveraddress$', isactivate=$isactivate$,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_driver_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_driver_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_driver_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_driver_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.drivertype ) as drivertype FROM p_relation_driver_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_driver_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_driver_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_driver_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_driver_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_house_t (personnelid,housetype,houseorigin,houseaddress,liveflag,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$housetype$','$houseorigin$','$houseaddress$',$liveflag$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_house_t SET housetype='$housetype$',houseorigin='$houseorigin$',houseaddress='$houseaddress$', liveflag=$liveflag$,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_house_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_house_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_house_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_house_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.housetype ) as housetype FROM p_relation_house_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.liveflag=1
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_house_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_house_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_house_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_house_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_identity_t (personnelid,identitytype,inventedname,accountid,wechat,telnumber,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$identitytype$','$inventedname$','$accountid$','$wechat$','$telnumber$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_identity_t SET identitytype='$identitytype$',inventedname='$inventedname$',accountid='$accountid$', wechat='$wechat$',telnumber='$telnumber$',isactivate=$isactivate$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_identity_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_identity_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_identity_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_identity_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.identitytype ) as identitytype FROM p_relation_identity_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_identity_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_identity_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_identity_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_identity_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_legal_t (personnelid,legalname,legaladdress,businessscope,registerdate,voiddate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$legalname$','$legaladdress$','$businessscope$','$registerdate$','$voiddate$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_legal_t SET legalname='$legalname$',legaladdress='$legaladdress$',businessscope='$businessscope$', registerdate='$registerdate$',voiddate='$voiddate$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_legal_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_legal_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_legal_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_legal_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.legalname ) as legalname FROM p_relation_legal_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_legal_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_legal_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_legal_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_legal_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_passport_t (personnelid,passporttype,passportno,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$passporttype$','$passportno$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_passport_t SET passporttype='$passporttype$',passportno='$passportno$',isactivate=$isactivate$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_passport_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_passport_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_passport_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_passport_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.passporttype ) as passporttype FROM p_relation_passport_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_passport_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_passport_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_passport_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_passport_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_payment_t (personnelid,paymentname,payaccount,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$paymentname$','$payaccount$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_payment_t SET paymentname='$paymentname$',payaccount='$payaccount$',isactivate=$isactivate$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_payment_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_payment_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_payment_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_payment_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.paymentname ) as paymentname FROM p_relation_payment_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_payment_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_payment_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_payment_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_payment_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_phone_t (personnelid,telbrand,imei,mac,gainorigin,knownlabel,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$telbrand$','$imei$','$mac$','$gainorigin$','$knownlabel$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_phone_t SET telbrand='$telbrand$',imei='$imei$',mac='$mac$',gainorigin='$gainorigin$', knownlabel='$knownlabel$',isactivate=$isactivate$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_phone_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_phone_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_phone_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_phone_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.telbrand ) as telbrand FROM p_relation_phone_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_phone_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_phone_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_phone_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_phone_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_telnumber_t (personnelid,telnumber,imsi,operator,belongarea,gainorigin,knownlabel,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$telnumber$','$imsi$','$operator$','$belongarea$','$gainorigin$','$knownlabel$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_telnumber_t SET telnumber='$telnumber$',imsi='$imsi$',operator='$operator$',belongarea='$belongarea$', gainorigin='$gainorigin$',knownlabel='$knownlabel$',isactivate=$isactivate$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_telnumber_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_telnumber_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_telnumber_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id DESC
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_telnumber_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT t.telnumber FROM p_relation_telnumber_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0 ORDER BY t.addtime DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM p_relation_telnumber_t where validflag>0 and imsi like '%$imsi$%'
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_telnumber_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_telnumber_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_telnumber_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_telnumber_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM p_relation_telnumber_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND personnelid = #personnelid# AND telnumber = #telnumber#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_vehicle_t (personnelid,gainorigin,vehicletype,vehicleorigin,vehiclenum,vehiclebrand,vehiclecolor,vehiclephoto,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$gainorigin$','$vehicletype$','$vehicleorigin$','$vehiclenum$','$vehiclebrand$','$vehiclecolor$','$vehiclephoto$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_vehicle_t SET gainorigin='$gainorigin$',vehicletype='$vehicletype$',vehicleorigin='$vehicleorigin$',vehiclenum='$vehiclenum$', vehiclebrand='$vehiclebrand$',vehiclecolor='$vehiclecolor$',vehiclephoto='$vehiclephoto$',isactivate=$isactivate$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_vehicle_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_vehicle_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_vehicle_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_vehicle_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(vehicletype,'(',vehiclenum,')') SEPARATOR ';') as vehicletype FROM p_relation_vehicle_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_vehicle_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ order by addtime desc LIMIT 4
SELECT * FROM p_relation_vehicle_t where validflag>0 and vehiclenum like '%$vehiclenum$%'
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_vehicle_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_vehicle_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_vehicle_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_vehicle_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_relation_wifi_t (personnelid,relatedtype,relateddetail,ssid,mac,longitude,latitude,isactivate,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$relatedtype$','$relateddetail$','$ssid$','$mac$','$longitude$','$latitude$',$isactivate$,1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_relation_wifi_t SET relatedtype='$relatedtype$',relateddetail='$relateddetail$',ssid='$ssid$',mac='$mac$', longitude='$longitude$',latitude='$latitude$',isactivate=$isactivate$, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_relation_wifi_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_wifi_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_wifi_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_relation_wifi_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( t.ssid ) as ssid FROM p_relation_wifi_t t WHERE t.validflag > 0 AND t.personnelid=$personnelid$ AND t.isactivate=0
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_wifi_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_wifi_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_wifi_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_relation_wifi_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_social_relations_t (personnelid,riskpersonnel,gainorigin,relationtype,appellation,cardnumber,personname,homeplace,workplace,telnumber1,telnumber2,telnumber3,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$riskpersonnel$,'$gainorigin$','$relationtype$','$appellation$','$cardnumber$','$personname$','$homeplace$','$workplace$','$telnumber1$','$telnumber2$','$telnumber3$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_social_relations_t SET gainorigin='$gainorigin$',relationtype='$relationtype$',appellation='$appellation$',cardnumber='$cardnumber$', personname='$personname$',homeplace='$homeplace$',workplace='$workplace$', telnumber1='$telnumber1$',telnumber2='$telnumber2$',telnumber3='$telnumber3$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$' WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE p_social_relations_t SET riskpersonnel=1, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE cardnumber='$cardnumber$'
UPDATE p_social_relations_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$

SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY FIELD(t2.relationtype,'家庭成员','血缘至亲','近亲姻亲','同行访友','同事朋友','其他')
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$

select count(1) from p_social_relations_t t where t.validflag>0 and t.cardnumber='$cardnumber$'
t.personnelid=$personnelid$
SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$

SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY FIELD(t2.relationtype,'家庭成员','血缘至亲','近亲姻亲','同行访友','同事朋友','其他')
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.id=$id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_social_relations_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT t1.personname,t1.cardnumber, t2.appellation,t2.memo FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.cardnumber ='$cardnumber$'
select * from p_social_relations_t t where t.validflag>0 and t.cardnumber='$cardnumber$' ORDER BY t.id desc LIMIT 1
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_social_relations_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ order by addtime desc LIMIT 4
select count(*) from p_social_relations_t where validflag>0 and personnelid=$personnelid$
select * from p_trajectory_record_t t where t.phonenumber in ($phonenumber$) ORDER BY t.perceivedtime desc

select count(1) from p_trajectory_record_t t where t.phonenumber in ($phonenumber$)
ORDER BY t.perceivedtime desc
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, zfw_p_relation_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t2.validflag>0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.personnelid=$personnelid$ ORDER BY t2.id
